mapper.select: SELECT d.device_name AS label, IFNULL(SUM(e.daily_kwh), 0) AS dailyKwh, IFNULL(SUM(e.monthly_kwh), 0) AS monthlyKwh, IFNULL(SUM(e.cost), 0) AS cost, IFNULL(AVG(e.efficiency), 0) AS efficiency FROM ess_device d LEFT JOIN energy_log e ON d.device_id = e.device_id AND e.log_date >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND e.log_date <= STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') WHERE d.member_id = #{memberId} GROUP BY d.device_id, d.device_name ORDER BY dailyKwh DESC
